title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Guided Program Studio
summary: A public-interest product team incrementally builds typed Gemini interaction and state ledger from original fixed provider, interaction, tool, approval, evaluation, and failure fixtures while retaining prior Python, HTTP, prompt, loop, security, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of typed Gemini interaction and state ledger while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
Use previous_interaction_id deliberately, distinguish server-side history from stateless replay, and preserve local audit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Interaction Resource
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop agent engineering team handles case 2664 during a privacy-minimized nonprofit workflow. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop State Retention Choice
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-state-retention-choice-t1mq02" that uses case 6022 to reconcile interaction resources, typed parts, previous identifiers, per-turn configuration, state choice, and retention evidence. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop State Retention Choice.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns State Retention Choice into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop State Retention Choice, keep State Retention Choice connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-state-retention-choice-t1mq02
# Competency: agentpy-state-retention-choice.
# Case 6022: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries.
def evidence_agentpy_state_retention_choice_t1mq02(interactions: int = 12, correlated_interactions: int = 12, part_types: int = 5, redeclared_configs: int = 12, ambiguous_state_links: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_t1mq02 = "t1mq02-20qm1t-6022"
    assert evidence_variant_t1mq02
    evidence_axes_t1mq02 = (
        "authorityt1mq02",
        "interaction6022",
        "tool20qm1t",
        "statet1mq026022",
        "evaluation6022t1mq02",
        "recovery20qm1t6022",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_t1mq02)) == 6
    if interactions < 1 or correlated_interactions < 0:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-count"
    if correlated_interactions != interactions:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-correlation"
    if part_types < 3 or redeclared_configs != interactions:
        return False, part_types, "part-or-config-gap"
    if ambiguous_state_links > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_state_links, "state-ambiguity"
    assert correlated_interactions == interactions and ambiguous_state_links == 0
    return True, correlated_interactions, "typed-interaction-state"
